title: Test Infrastructure

classes.name: PackageUpdater
methods: run(): void — orchestrates findTestFiles → processFile → displaySummary
findTestFiles(): array — recursive scan of INTEGRATIONS_DIR, filters *Test.php in 'Latest' dirs
processFile(string $file): void — extracts class, calls findLibrary + findComposerFile + updatePackageVersion
findLibrary(string $className, string $file): ?string — calls getTestedLibrary() or reads composer.json
findComposerFile(string $className, string $file): ?string — calls getAppIndexScript/getConsoleScript or uses local composer.json
updatePackageVersion(string $library, string $composerFile): void — fetches latest, updates composer.json
getLatestVersion(string $library): ?string — HTTP GET packagist API, filters stable versions
displaySummary(): void — prints updates and errors, exits 1 on errors

external_types: DDTrace\Log\InterpolateTrait — used by DebugLogger for message interpolation
DDTrace\Log\LogLevel — constants DEBUG/WARNING/ERROR used by DebugLogger
key_relationships: WebServer composes Sapi (strategy pattern — one of 8 concrete SAPI implementations chosen at start())
WebServer composes NginxServer (created only when sapi.isFastCgi() is true)
WebServer holds static PhpApache (singleton for apache2handler SAPI, persisted across tests)
PackageUpdater reads integration test files and updates composer.json via Packagist API
important_notes: WebServer is the primary test harness: it selects the correct PHP SAPI at runtime via DD_TRACE_TEST_SAPI env var or explicit setters (setRoadrunner, setOctane, setSwoole, setFrankenphp, setForceSapi).
SAPI selection priority in start(): roadrunner > octane > swoole > frankenphp > forceSapi/env-var (cgi-fcgi, fpm-fcgi, apache2handler, default=CliServer).
FastCGI SAPIs (cgi-fcgi, fpm-fcgi) additionally spin up NginxServer as a reverse proxy.
PhpApache is a static singleton — reused across test suite; shutdown function cleans it up.
WebServer.stop() sleeps DD_TRACE_AGENT_FLUSH_INTERVAL * 2 ms to allow BGS trace flushing before teardown.
DebugTransport accumulates sent traces in-memory; used to assert traces in unit tests without a real agent.
DebugLogger captures log records by level+message; has() and hasOnly() enable precise log assertions.

PackageUpdater is a standalone CLI script (no namespace, auto-invoked at bottom of file); scans tests/Integrations/**/*Latest/*Test.php, queries Packagist API for latest stable version, and patches composer.json files in place.
